scripts.bootstrap:check: pnpm domain:build && dotenv -e .env.devnet -- pnpm exec tsx automation/src/index.ts
scripts.build: pnpm domain:build && anchor build && pnpm --filter @meridian/app build && pnpm --filter @meridian/automation build
scripts.test: cargo test --manifest-path programs/meridian/Cargo.toml && pnpm domain:build && pnpm testkit:build && pnpm exec tsx --test tests/**/*.test.ts
scripts.test:unit: pnpm domain:build && pnpm testkit:build && pnpm exec tsx --test tests/unit/**/*.test.ts
scripts.test:integration: pnpm domain:build && pnpm testkit:build && pnpm exec tsx --test tests/integration/**/*.test.ts
scripts.test:domain: pnpm domain:build && pnpm exec tsx --test tests/unit/domain/**/*.test.ts
scripts.test:automation: pnpm domain:build && pnpm testkit:build && pnpm exec tsx --test tests/unit/automation/**/*.test.ts
scripts.test:program: pnpm domain:build && pnpm testkit:build && pnpm exec tsx --test tests/integration/program/**/*.test.ts
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @meridian/domain typecheck && pnpm --filter @meridian/testkit typecheck && pnpm --filter @meridian/app typecheck && pnpm --filter @meridian/automation typecheck
scripts.deploy:devnet: dotenv -e .env.devnet -- anchor deploy --provider.cluster devnet --program-name meridian --program-keypair keys/meridian-program.json
scripts.automation:morning: dotenv -e .env -- pnpm exec tsx automation/src/cli.ts morning
scripts.automation:afternoon: dotenv -e .env -- pnpm exec tsx automation/src/cli.ts afternoon
scripts.automation:close: dotenv -e .env -- pnpm exec tsx automation/src/cli.ts close
scripts.automation:settle: dotenv -e .env -- pnpm exec tsx automation/src/cli.ts settle
scripts.automation:bootstrap: dotenv -e .env -- pnpm exec tsx automation/src/cli.ts bootstrap
